prompt.task: Analyze the weekly habit tracking data and generate a structured progress report.
prompt.context: This analysis is part of a personal productivity system. The user logs their habits daily and wants an objective weekly assessment. The output feeds into a dashboard that tracks trends over time, so consistent structure is essential.

constraints.constraint: Base all assessments on the provided data only.
Do not make assumptions about reasons for missed habits.
Be encouraging but honest; do not minimize poor performance.

prompt.input: Week: Jan 13-19, 2025 Goals: - Exercise: 5 days/week (completed: Mon, Wed, Sat = 3 days) - Reading: 30 min/day (completed: Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri = 5 days) - Meditation: 10 min/day (completed: Mon only = 1 day) - No social media before noon (completed: Mon, Tue, Wed = 3 days) - Weekly review: 1x/week (completed: Yes)

output_contract.format: Return valid JSON matching the schema below. No additional commentary outside the JSON structure.

constraints_on_output.constraint: Overall score must be weighted average of completion rates.
Habits array must include all habits from input, in order.
Status thresholds: exceeded (>100%), met (90-100%), partial (50-89%), missed (<50%).
Focus areas limited to max 2; prioritize lowest performers.
Recommendations must be specific actions, not vague advice.

output_contract.example_output: { "week": "Jan 13-19, 2025", "overall_score": 58, "overall_trend": "stable", "habits": [ { "name": "Exercise", "target": "5 days/week", "achieved": "3 days", "completion_rate": 60, "status": "partial", "streak_info": null }, { "name": "Reading", "target": "30 min/day", "achieved": "5 days", "completion_rate": 71, "status": "partial", "streak_info": "5-day streak (Mon-Fri)" }, { "name": "Meditation", "target": "10 min/day", "achieved": "1 day", "completion_rate": 14, "status": "missed", "streak_info": null }, { "name": "No social media before noon", "target": "7 days/week", "achieved": "3 days", "completion_rate": 43, "status": "missed", "streak_info": null }, { "name": "Weekly review", "target": "1x/week", "achieved": "1x", "completion_rate": 100, "status": "met", "streak_info": null } ], "wins": [ "Reading habit maintained 5-day weekday streak", "Completed weekly review as planned", "Exercise happened 3x despite not meeting full target" ], "focus_areas": [ { "habit": "Meditation", "issue": "Only completed once; likely deprioritized when busy", "recommendation": "Stack meditation immediately after morning coffee before checking phone" }, { "habit": "No social media before noon", "issue": "Failed more than half the week", "recommendation": "Use app blocker (e.g., Freedom) with scheduled blocks until noon" } ], "next_week_priority": "Rebuild meditation consistency - aim for 4+ days" }
